title: chionanthus henryanus
intro: Chionanthus henryanus, also known as the Chinese Fringe Tree or White Fringe Tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chionanthus henryanus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Chionanthus henryanus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
